notes: Backend-only automation behind the screen-backed Reminder resource. (1) On debt creation, generate the reminder schedule: -3 days before due, due date, +3 days, +7 days; stops on payment; business-configurable tone/policy (Gentle/Friendly/Final). (2) Delivery worker behind MessageSender (BulkSMSNigeria) sends sms/whatsapp on due occurrences, debiting the monthly send allowance (metered). manual/call/printable channels are recorded-only and free. Delivery worker MAY ship as a 501 scaffold; contracts unchanged when live.
